creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
I'll note that the main-armv7-default official package
builder run that recently started had lang/rust fail
while fetching.

https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/ampere2/data/main-armv7-default/pdfee61567d9e_s5036d9652a/logs/errors/rust-1.82.0_1.log

reports:

. . .
=======================<phase: fetch          >============================
===== env: NO_DEPENDS=yes USER=root UID=0 GID=0
